name: Spicy Garlic Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 large Head garlic, cloves separated, peeled, and chopped
3 cups Chicken stock OR Canned low-salt broth
1 tsp Cayenne pepper, or to taste
recipeInstructions:
Chopped parsley or chives for garnish.
Over medium heat, add garlic to butter and sauté until golden, about 3 minutes (do not brown). Add flour and stir until the mixture is just golden, about 2 minutes. Add stock and bring the mixture to a boil, stirring constantly. Reduce heat and simmer for 15 minutes. Stir in cayenne. Garnish with parsley or chives and serve.
